name: Eggplant-Spinach Curry
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Spinach; rinsed, dried, and finely chopped
Piece ginger root (1-inch); peeled and grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saucepan with half of the mustard seeds.
2. Add the remaining mustard seeds when the cooked seeds begin to pop.
3. Add the garlic and sauté until tender.
4. Gradually add the spinach, stirring occasionally to prevent scorching.
5. When the spinach wilts, incorporate the eggplant, ginger, jalapeno chiles, turmeric, paprika, coriander, and cumin.
6. Sauté to blend the flavors. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 15 minutes.
7. Add the tomatoes and season with salt. Cook uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Garnish with cilantro.
